/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/HelloQt.dir/HelloQt_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelloQt.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelloQt.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelloQt.dir/entrypage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelloQt.dir/catalogpage.cpp.o -o HelloQt -F/Users/sxr/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/sxr/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib /Users/sxr/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /Users/sxr/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /Users/sxr/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers /opt/homebrew/lib/libjsoncpp.26.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.1.1/lib/libavformat.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.1.1/lib/libavcodec.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.1.1/lib/libavutil.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.1.1/lib/libswscale.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.1.1/lib/libswresample.dylib
